title: Nenje Nenje Lyrics Ratchagan
stanzas:
nenje nenje marandhu vidu.
ninaivinai kadandhu vidu.
nenje nenje urangi vidu
nijangalai thurandhu vidu.

kangalai vitruththan oviyamaa
venneeril meengal thoongumaa
kanneeril kaadhal vaazhumaa

nenje nenje marandhu vidu.
ninaivinai kadandhu vidu.
nenje nenje urangi vidu
nijangalai thurandhu vidu.

penne penne unn valaiyal
enakkoru vilangallavo
kaatrukku sirai ennavo

thanmaanaththin
thalaiyai vitru
kaadhalin vaal vaangavo
kanmoodi naan vaazhavo

unnai enni mul viriththu
padukkavum pazhagik konden.
ennil yaarum kallerindhaal

ullaththai maraiththen
uyir vali poruththen en
suyaththai edhuvo
suttadhadi vandhen

nenje nenje nerungi vidu
nigazhndhadhai marandhu vidu
nenje nenje negizhndhu vidu
nijangalil kalandhu vidu

katti vaiththa kaatre
vandhu vidu
kaigal rendai yaendhinen..
kaadhal pichchai ketkiren
nenje nenje
nenje nenje..
nenje nenje..

anbe anbe nee prinidhaal
kangalil mazhai varume
kaatrenai kai vidume.

vidhai azhidhu sedi varume
sippigal udaiththa pinne
muththukkal kai varume

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nenje Nenje'?

The song conveys themes of love and nostalgia, expressing the longing and memories associated with a deep emotional connection.

In which movie is 'Nenje Nenje' featured?

'Nenje Nenje' is featured in the movie Ratchagan.

Who are the singers of 'Nenje Nenje'?

The song is sung by renowned artists K.J. Yesudas and Sadhana Sargam.

Who composed the music for 'Nenje Nenje'?

The music for 'Nenje Nenje' was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

When was 'Nenje Nenje' released?

'Nenje Nenje' was released on October 30, 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Ratchagan, 'Nenje Nenje' serves as a poignant reflection of love and memories. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect accompaniment for moments of introspection. With its rich vocal performances, the track beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and connection. It resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenje Nenje is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.J. Yesudas and Sadhana Sargam, this song from the Ratchagan soundtrack showcases A.R. Rahman's magical composition. Dive into a world of emotions as the lyrics resonate with the heart's deepest feelings.
stanzaMeanings: Forget, forget your heart. Overcome your memories. Forget, forget your heart, let go of the truths.
Are the eyes like paintings? Do the fish sleep in the water? Does love live in the tears?
Forget, forget your heart. Overcome your memories. Forget, forget your heart, let go of the truths.
Girl, girl, does your beauty shine like a light for me? Is it a prison for the wind?
Will love take away the crown of self-respect? Will I live with my eyes closed?
I thought of you and fell asleep. If anyone calls me, I will laugh and fall asleep.
I hid my feelings and waited for life. Whatever is mine has come to me.
Forget, forget your heart, let go of what has happened. Forget, forget your heart, merge with the truths.
The wind that was held has come. I raised both hands. I am begging for love, forget, forget, forget, forget... forget, forget...
Oh dear, if you are near, rain will come to my eyes, and I will give you my hand.
The seed will fall, and trouble will come. After breaking the shells, the pearls will come.
Oh king of love, if you give one, life will come in another.
If I let you go a little, happiness will come in love.
Not everything is permanent; if it changes, it will sprout in the east.
Forget, forget your heart, let go of what has happened. Forget, forget your heart, merge with the truths.
The wind that was held has come. I raised both hands. I am begging for love, forget, forget, forget, forget... forget, forget...
